name: Ares Real Estate Income Trust Inc.
business: Ares Real Estate Income Trust Inc. is a NAV-based perpetual life REIT primarily focused on investing in and operating a diverse portfolio of real property and investing in other real estate-related assets. As of December 31, 2025, its consolidated real property portfolio consisted of 143 properties totaling approximately 30.5 million square feet located in 34 markets throughout the U.S. The company targets current income, capital preservation, and capital appreciation through multi-asset class investing in direct real property and real estate-related assets.

exposures.sentence: We currently focus our investment activities primarily across the major U.S. property sectors (residential, industrial, retail and office), data center properties and investments in real estate debt and securities.

We currently focus our investment activities primarily across the major U.S. property sectors (residential, industrial, retail and office), data center properties and investments in real estate debt and securities.
Currently, infrastructure is not expected to comprise more than 10% of our assets with a focus on real estate-related infrastructure and renewable energy sources.
